about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Here's my story.
about.yearsExperienceAfter: years of experience adding value to business processes in the commercial and public service sectors.
about.careerDescription: Implementing functional, scalable and reusable code solutions throughout my career, aligned with user needs and business goals. In addition to technically coordinating and mentoring a development team in their day-to-day activities, careers and technical growth.
about.technologies: Experience and advanced knowledge in technologies such as **React JS**, **Next JS**, **Stencil JS**, **Typescript**, **Web Components**, **Framer Motion**, **Micro Frontends**, **GraphQL**, version control with **Git**, design patterns, **SOLID** and **Clean Code** principles, management of agile work methodologies such as **SCRUM** and **Kanban**.
about.skills: Skills in problem solving, teamwork, learning ability and adaptability to different environments. Lover of great challenges and with a great investigative character.
about.findMe: If you want to know a little more you can find me on [**Linkedin**](https://linkedin.com/in/jaimetorresv) and take a look at my open source projects. [**Github**](https://github.com/jaime00)
